title: ADK-204: Local Mocking & Agent Testing
author: Google Cloud
description: Design regression suites, unit test tool integrations, and mock model endpoints to establish robust agent CI/CD pipelines.

features.title: Unit Testing Tools
features.description: Write local unit tests for tool functions to verify response accuracy without querying LLMs.

features.title: Model Mocking
features.description: Use mock responses to capture agent states and token payloads, avoiding live API invocation fees.

features.title: CI Pipeline Integration
features.description: Build regression testing scripts that integrate with GitHub Actions build verification steps.
